name: codex-crosscompat
summary: Pure-bash compiler converting claude-sail to Codex CLI distribution. 9 WUs across 4 batches. Critical path: WU4→WU6→WU7 (length 3). Max parallel width: 5. Ground truth validated: hooks.json identical schema, agents are plain markdown + openai.yaml, install root ~/.codex/.
spec_digest: 9 WUs: command adapter, agent adapter (openai.yaml), hook path rewriter, AGENTS.md generator, plugin manifest, installer, tests, divergence tracking, master assembly
